scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w language-server && npm run build -w extension
scripts.watch: concurrently "npm run watch -w shared" "npm run watch -w language-server" "npm run watch -w extension"
scripts.clean: npm run clean -w shared && npm run clean -w language-server && npm run clean -w extension
scripts.package: npm run build && npm run package -w extension
